Off Calendar Apr-21-2011 Judgment Entered
MINI MINUTES: 9:11am
JPT David H.S. Commins, clerk Annie Pascual, nothing on record, dept. 414.
Cause called for Small Claims Appeal. Limited Scope Attorney John P. Campion, SBN #219193, appears on behalf of Appellant, Carmen Ribeiro who is also present. Respondent, Steven Sung appears on behalf of Steve's Jewelry in pro per. Also present is Steven Sung's son, Edward to assist in translation. Parties, previously sworn, testify in the narrative and respond to questions from JPT Commins.

Exhibits received:
EXRA: 9/1/10 DATED RECEIPT
EXRB: 7/28/10 DATED RECEIPT

EXA1: Copy of dated reciept with additional receipts
EXA2: Copy of reciept of "Forced Sale"
EXA3: Copy of T-mobile phone records

MINI MINUTES: 10:41am
Judge Pro Tem Alexander Anolik, clerk - Leslie Gomez, nothing on record, dept. 414.
Cause called for Small Claims Appeal. Appellant, Carmen Ribeiro appears through attorney John Campion. Respondent Steve's Jewelry appears through Steven Sung in pro per. Parties, previously sworn, testify in the narrative and respond to questions from Judge Anolik.

Appellant requests a continuance, it is granted for April 21, 2011.
